## Description
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of the changes made and the problem being solved. -->

## Related Issues
<!-- Link any related issues using keywords, e.g., Closes #12 or Fixes #34 -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?
<!-- Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce. -->
<!-- E.g., Select scheme AnchoredTests and hit Cmd + U. Verify active tab extraction on Arc Browser. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have generated the Xcode project using `xcodegen generate` and verified it compiles.
- [ ] I have run the unit test suite (`Cmd + U` or command line) and all tests pass.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works (if applicable).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / README.md / CONTRIBUTING.md (if applicable).
- [ ] I did not commit raw SQLite queries outside of `SQLiteSessionStore` or `DashboardQueries`.
- [ ] I have verified the change does not introduce regressions.
